intro: Syncarpha striata, also known as the Striped Everlast, is a small, shrubby plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the coastal regions of Western Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, contributing to its potential health benefits in treating wounds, infections, and oxidative stress-related conditions.
